tile.title: SonarVision: Depth Sounder to Underwater Video via Self-Supervised Multi-Camera Learning
tile.content: SonarVision adapts LingBot-Map's Geometric Context Transformer (GCT) from RGB video 3D reconstruction to acoustic sonar modality. The system converts depth sounder returns into predicted underwater video frames using a feed-forward pipeline: SonarEncoder (ViT-adapted for 4-channel acoustic data) → Streaming GCT Aggregator (causal attention, KV cache, 3D RoPE on depth×bearing×time) → VideoDecoder (DPT head with UnderwaterColorHead for blue-green cast). Self-supervision comes from multi-depth camera arrays: when sonar detects a target at depth D, the camera at depth D provides ground truth. Weight function: w = exp(-|d_cam - d_sonar|² / 2σ²). No manual labeling required — the physics of the water column does the work.
